name: Build Playbook
description: Extract the firm's market positions from precedent documents and build a scoped playbook (firm / client / matter / personal). Replaces Contract Express and Practical Law market standards.
taskDescriptionTemplate: Build a {{scope}}-scope {{practiceArea}} playbook{{ownerContext}} for {{jurisdiction}}. Extract standard positions, fallbacks, and red lines for all standard clause types in this practice area from the firm's precedent library.
promptTemplate: Build a {{scope}}-scope {{practiceArea}} playbook{{ownerContext}} for {{jurisdiction}}. Extract standard positions, fallbacks, and red lines for all standard clause types in this practice area from the firm's precedent library.
